# Picture Hunt — Deployment Mirror

⚠️ **This repo is a deployment mirror only.** The source of truth is [VentureLabAI/venture-lab/picture-hunt/](https://github.com/VentureLabAI/venture-lab/tree/main/picture-hunt).

Changes made here directly will be overwritten by the next sync from the monorepo.

## Live Site
https://venturelabai.github.io/picture-hunt/

## How This Works
- Code is developed in the `venture-lab` monorepo under `picture-hunt/app/`
- This repo is synced from the monorepo for GitHub Pages deployment
- GitHub Pages serves this repo's root as the live site

## Do Not Edit Here
All changes should go to: `VentureLabAI/venture-lab` → `picture-hunt/app/`
